title: fragaria sylvestris var. monophylla
intro: Fragaria sylvestris var. monophylla, also known as a wild strawberry or mountain strawberry, is a rare, single-leafed variety of the Fragaria sylvestris species, characterized by its unique leaf morphology. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and soothing irritated skin. The health benefits of Fragaria sylvestris var. monophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and provide antioxidant support. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
